heading: Stream Processors
body:
The cost of running a stream processor at a given tier varies by
region. The following table shows the hourly price for a stream
processor of a given tier in a given region.

| Region       | SP2     | SP5     | SP10    | SP30    | SP50    |
| ------------ | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- |
| europe-west1 | $0.0605 | $0.1210 | $0.2090 | $0.4290 | $1.7161 |
| us-central1  | $0.0550 | $0.1100 | $0.1900 | $0.3900 | $1.5600 |
